ham: Hi, aapka Airtel recharge ₹150 successful hua. Naya balance ₹3,200. Ab unlimited data enjoy karo. Support ke liye HELP reply karo.
spam: URGENT: Traffic challan pending on your vehicle. Aapko ₹4990 fine pay karna hai 24 ghante ke andar, varna police arrest karegi. Pay now: <URL>. Jald kare, warna penalty double ho jayegi.
